description: A reader should fail sync when the seed emits WANT for a revision that MANIFEST did not advertise as reachable from accepted sync roots.

assertions.description: Reader rejects WANT because the requested revision is not reachable from the accepted sync roots established by MANIFEST.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the unadvertised WANT violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a post-MANIFEST accepted-root negative interop case.
The seed still uses the normal peer-store transcript generator, but the harness injects WANT for an unadvertised revision immediately after MANIFEST.
